# TechThrusters

> TechThrusters is a community-driven platform empowering tech innovation and learning through events, workshops, and meetups.

TechThrusters helps people learn, connect, and build in tech. Use the links below to quickly gather the most relevant context about the community, upcoming/past events, and meetup highlights.

## Start Here

- [Home](https://techthrusters.org/): Mission, community stats (Learn / Connect / Build), sponsors & partners, team members, and testimonials.
- [Community](https://techthrusters.org/community): Community story timeline, core values, FAQ, and resources (how to join, connect, and contribute).

## Events & Workshops

- [Events](https://techthrusters.org/events): Upcoming events (if any) and a “Past Events” section with clickable “Watch” links (YouTube) and short talk descriptions.

## Featured Event Videos

- [Building Developer Communities](https://www.youtube.com/live/629hOd60J9k?si=D6FwwRcRLf6t4AtD): How to create and sustain thriving developer communities.
- [Integrating LLMs in Your Applications (Security-First)](https://www.youtube.com/live/wRNQ5wFU7WQ?si=pXE3_ahfdCqB5-41): A security-first guide to integrating LLMs safely.
- [Transitioning to Product Management](https://www.youtube.com/live/kIcvBf5bRyc?feature=shared): A roadmap for breaking into product management.
- [Learning Open Source with Hacktoberfest](https://www.youtube.com/live/iphlaYDN3J0?si=WWbIS9l21jikFpcV): Get started with Hacktoberfest and contribute effectively.
- [Getting Started with Git and GitHub](https://www.youtube.com/live/t9X_PDOJyCI?si=NC2HWRAiQH_K6tHR): Practical fundamentals of version control and collaboration.
- [Getting Started with Angular](https://www.youtube.com/live/QL6Zbnf_mi4?si=CdnSVv9pSspQRrW0): Best practices and real-world entry for Angular developers.

## Meetups & Speaker Archive

- [Meetups](https://techthrusters.org/meetup): Photo “glimpses” from past meetups (e.g., Meetup 1.0/2.0/3.0, GenAI meetup, CelCon) plus meetup stats and sponsor logos.
- [Speaker Archive (on Meetups page)](https://techthrusters.org/meetup): The same page includes a speaker archive with speaker names/designations and links (e.g., LinkedIn) for follow-ups.

## Join the Community

- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/techthrusters): Main place to introduce yourself and connect with other members.
- [Discord (alternate invite)](https://bit.ly/TBDISCORD): Backup invite link to the same community.
- [Sign up](https://techthrusters.org/sign-up): Create a member account (authentication required); successful signup redirects to `/events`.
- [Profile](https://techthrusters.org/profile): Member profile and settings (authentication required).

## Programs & Resources

- [Open Source Project Incubator Program](https://bit.ly/TTOSPI): Program supporting contributions and building in public with the community.

## Optional

- [Robots.txt](https://techthrusters.org/robots.txt): Traditional crawler access rules.

## Social & Partners (Extra Context)

- [Twitter (X)](https://twitter.com/TechThrusters): Organization updates and announcements.
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/techthrusters): Community updates and partner visibility.
- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/tech.thrusters): Community highlights and photos.

## Sponsors & Partners (Example Sites)

- [GitHub](https://github.com/)
- [Peerlist](https://peerlist.io/)
- [Securityium](https://www.securityium.com/)
- [GeeksforGeeks](https://www.geeksforgeeks.org/)
- [Cloud Native Day Pune](https://www.cloudnativepune.com/)
- [Hack The League](https://hacktheleague.com/)

- [Mrunank Pawar](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrunankpawar/)
